title: Redecorated Pot
description: Subtle redesign for the decorated pot and its patterns
body:
Redecorated Pots is a simple resourcepack that retextures decorated pots. The subtle redesign gives the patterns a more 3D look conveyed through texture, and makes them feel carved-in. 

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YFLwtLdW/images/91cd2ebd8fb72725049ca5fef77f90621a95d1e6.png)
